channel.title: RVA Figure Drawing
channel.description: Figure drawing sessions in Richmond, VA

item.title: Thu, Jun 25 · 6:00 PM – 8:30 PM — Figure Drawing Open Studio
item.description: Location: Hanover Arts & Activities Center, 500 South Center Street, Ashland, VA 23005 | Cost: $10 | Figure Drawing Open Studio with live model. Bring your own drawing materials—tables and chairs provided. Ages 18+, no registration required.

item.title: Wed, Jul 8 · 6:00 PM – 9:00 PM — Figure Drawing - 7/8
item.description: Location: Studio Two Three, 109 W 15th St Richmond, VA 23224 | Cost: $20 | 3-hour figure drawing workshop with nude model. Instructor Carter Helmandollar leads gestural poses to longer poses. Bring your own drawing/painting/sculpting materials. No photography permitted.

item.title: Mon, Jul 13 · 10:00 AM – 5:30 PM — The Alchemy Of Expression – Portrait Sculpture Workshop
item.description: Location: Manchester Studios RVA, 1300 West Main Street, Richmond, Virginia 23220 | Cost: $1600 | Two-week intensive portrait sculpture workshop (July 13–17 and 20–24). Covers skull anatomy, muscles, facial features, and creating a likeness from a live model using Classical Realism observational techniques. All skill levels welcome. All materials and model fees included.

item.title: Thu, Jul 30 · 6:00 PM – 8:30 PM — Figure Drawing Open Studio
item.description: Location: Hanover Arts & Activities Center, 500 South Center Street, Ashland, VA 23005 | Cost: $10 | Figure Drawing Open Studio with live model. Bring your own drawing materials—tables and chairs provided. Ages 18+, no registration required.

item.title: Thu, Aug 27 · 6:00 PM – 8:30 PM — Figure Drawing Open Studio
item.description: Location: Hanover Arts & Activities Center, 500 South Center Street, Ashland, VA 23005 | Cost: $10 | Figure Drawing Open Studio with live model. Bring your own drawing materials—tables and chairs provided. Ages 18+, no registration required.

item.description: Location: Hanover Arts & Activities Center, 500 South Center Street, Ashland, VA 23005 | Cost: $10 | Figure Drawing Open Studio with live model. Bring your own drawing materials—tables and chairs provided. Ages 18+, no registration required.
